backup-vm.description: Treat the PBS listener as the dependency gate, then require datastore enumeration before the restore is considered warmed up.

docker-runtime.description: Allow the restored control-plane runtime time to settle, require Keycloak, NetBox, and Windmill to answer locally, then replay the governed post-restore control-plane reads.

postgres.description: Require local PostgreSQL readiness before the schema and dump checks can promote the restore into the warmed-up stage.
